75641.subject: 📈 Memecoins go bananas on Robinhood chain
75641.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $62,709 (-1.2%) | **ETH** $1,747 (-1.8%) | **SOL** $78 (-3.7%)

* US conducts new round of [attacks on Iran](https://x.com/tradfi/status/2074673075241758909?s=20), ends MOU

* Oil [surges](https://x.com/i/status/2074801049840366057) as Iran fires on ships cross the Strait of Hormuz — US [revokes](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2074567482237477053?s=20) Iran’s oil license

* Robinhood chain memecoins see [massive volume](https://dexscreener.com/robinhood) led by [CASHCAT](https://dexscreener.com/robinhood/0xa70fc67c9f69da90b63a0e4c05d229954574e313) hitting a $60M market cap — Daily DEX volume tops [$30M](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2074669262879227932?s=20)

* Opensea adds [Robinhood chain support](https://x.com/opensea/status/2074565480539447754?s=20)

* Claude [extends Fable 5 access](https://x.com/claudeai/status/2074548242386178258?s=20) through Friday

* Ondo launches [24/7 perps ](https://x.com/Cointelegraph/status/2074496259688116417?s=20)markets for equities, commodities, and ETFs

* SEC plans [Safe Harbor](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2074657145937932721?s=20) proposal for this month

* New SpaceX AI model to be [released today](https://x.com/AndrewCurran_/status/2074611115343172069?s=20)

* Coinbase wins UK license to [offer stocks](https://decrypt.co/372912/coinbase-wins-uk-license-to-offer-stocks-and-derivatives-alongside-crypto)

* The Kast crypto card faces backlash on their [card deposit mechanics](https://x.com/Decentralisedco/status/2074497461092233255?s=20)

———————————————————————————


———

You are reading a plain text version of this post. For the best experience, copy and paste this link in your browser to view the post online:
https://www.dailybones.com/p/memecoins-go-bananas-on-robinhood-chain

Fear and Greed is at
26
(Fear)
and BTC is at
$62K.
Bitcoin slipped slightly overnight after six consecutive sessions
of recovery from June's lows, with momentum cooling as traders
assess whether the bounce has legs

The macro picture is shifting. A soft jobs print last week moved
rate expectations, ETF inflows returned, and whale accumulation
picked up near key support. Today the structural story takes
centre stage, with one of the world's most crypto-sceptical
institutions making its most significant move yet.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

Half of Bitcoin Supply Is Now Held at a Loss

More than 50% of circulating Bitcoin is now underwater, a
threshold K33 says has historically marked the late stage of a
bear market.

In three of the four prior instances since 2011, one-year
forward returns from this signal reached between 69% and 359%.

How many days after this signal did Bitcoin bottom in past
cycles?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/KzuhmJbbjYOPi-LLNgSEYw~~/AAQRxRA~/hPYn6WcN3TYmN9YWC_1LLguOXNhdWDUyydGzyzSpODa_qwWfv9Q4zmF1iYOOaUkwvrJV31AD3K7ORKmxe9c8_RLwlr3AgPtiL_V3t7S_X53oN4V7xSSNnV8p54_o2MPxNsQUGU6grd4to1nwSkxmmn7yKld0XWpCtjzR2zSbk21gFpvyqzMxdVRlMPlgXrmlOlIr_CmeXi8CvdgB3gF-Fg~~ )
   Zcash Is Surging as Developers Near a Critical Proof

ZEC jumped more than 12% on July 7 after developers said they
are close to a mathematical proof confirming no hidd
